failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: F7YEa5
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: F7YEa5
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
2. Test Case ID: G0eaNS
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551"
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: qKtRif
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type
[201] Created:
`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": null}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
4. Test Case ID: HXIsFy
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":324,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":null,"phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": null, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: F7YEa5
- Response violates schema
null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "type": "string", "format": "date-time", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
null
[201] Created:
`{"id":320,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":"+351912345678","createdAt":null}`

- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551"
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:25.515483551","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"address": 123, "phone": "+351912345678"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
3. Test Case ID: qKtRif
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: in body - object with invalid 'phone' value: Incorrect type
[201] Created:
`{"id":321,"name":"Napoli Centrale","address":"123","phone":null,"createdAt":null}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Napoli Centrale", "address": 123, "phone": null}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

null is not of type "string"

null
[201] Created:

5. Test Case ID: cusxCD
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"error":"Bad Request","message":"name: must not be blank","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:34.633108767","status":400}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": ""}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: 2XcN6L
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:53:53" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:53:53"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:44"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:45"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: 2XcN6L
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:53:53" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:53:53"
[200] OK:
`[{"id":2,"name":"Roma Antica","address":"Avenida da Liberdade 22, Lisboa","phone":"+351 210 200 200","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53"},{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":"Praça do Mercado 5, Coimbra","phone":"+351 239 300 300","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:44"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:45"},{"id":6,"n // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias

1. Test Case ID: v0mf78
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:24.013086264" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:56:24.013086264"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizzeria with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:24.013086264","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas

null is not of type "string"

[201] Created:
`{"id":7,"name":"K񦺸®Â𰀶â~¹^¨","ingredients":null,"price":0.0,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":null,"pizzeriaId":142}`

1. Test Case ID: tT3qYO
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.284894973" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.284894973"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:25.284894973","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "Margherita", "ingredients": "Tomato, mozzarella, basil", "pizzeriaId": 1, "price": 12.5, "size": "medium", "isAvailable": true, "photoUrl": "https://example.com/pizzas/margherita.jpg"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1

3. Test Case ID: w3CzYa
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:53" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }

"2026-04-24T04:56:53"
[200] OK:
`{"id":238,"name":"9¡Ú\u0005ñ>eD","ingredients":null,"price":0.0,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:56:53","pizzeriaId":3}`

null is not of type "string"
Schema at /properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[200] OK:
`{"id":310,"name":"<xsl:value-of select=\"system-property('xsl:vendor')\"/>","address":null,"phone":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:55"}`

curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "<xsl:value-of select=\"system-property('"'"'xsl:vendor'"'"')\"/>"}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias/310
4. Test Case ID: 6Ai4JV
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx Hint: The request body contains 4 additional properties not defined in the schema (` xé(`, ` to£P񾮘 񜫪`, `k(񦑄` and 1 more). The server likely rejects unexpected fields. Add `additionalProperties: false` to your schema to prevent this.
[400] Bad Request:
`{"timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:57:06.444Z","status":400,"error":"Bad Request","path":"/api/pizzerias/251"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "I", "phone": "\u00f5/D\udbb6\udcafUt\u00e1\u00c9\u00a8)\u00a9", "\rx\u00e9(\u0096": [[-2.9466883636952055e+201], {"\u009c\u00fb\u0092=\u0096\u00b0\u00ed\u00d4=\u0012\u00b2": false, "#H\u0089\u008f\ud9c6\udcff\u00b3": 25383, "\u009c\u00da\ud9cc\ude64": "\ud829\ude47\uda63\udc8f\u0018"}, []], "\u001cto\u00a3P\u0095\ud9ba\udf98\u00a0\ud932\udeea": [[], [], {"\u009c4[\"\udb8d\ude48": {}, "": [], "\u00f6U\b&": ["\u0007\ud987\udefe\uda19\udd9d\u0004\ud8da\udd62\udb85\udd9a\n", 8.488449977514607e-290]}], "\udbe5\udf86\u00b3)\u00a8\ud8b9\udd17\udaba\udf55HD\u00c4\uda1a\ude56\ud928\udf15\f\u001b\u00e8\u00c7": ["\u00c1\u00a7\u00a0\\{r\ud87a\udc5f\u0012H\udb88\udc96", 1.2404009117949935e+142, null], "k(\ud959\udc44\u0096": [null, []]}' http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias/251

1. Test Case ID: 9IVDAs
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:53:53" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:53:53"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: 9IVDAs
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:53:53" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /components/schemas/Pizza/properties/createdAt:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Creation timestamp", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:53:53"
- API accepted schema-violating request
Invalid data should have been rejected Expected: 400, 401, 403, 404, 406, 422, 428, 5xx Invalid component: parameter `pizzeriaId` in query - incorrect type
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Pepperoni","ingredients":"Tomato, mozzarella, pepperoni","price":11.00,"size":"large","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513104890138-7c749659a591","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":4,"name":"Quattro Formaggi","ingredients":"Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, provolone","price":12.40,"size":"medium","isAvailable":true,"photoUrl":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53","pizzeriaId":2},{"id":5,"name":"Vegetariana","ingredients":"Tomato, mozza // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas?pizzeriaId='

1. Test Case ID: LZ9bG7
- Response violates schema
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.324970239" is not a "date-time"
Schema at /properties/timestamp:
{ "format": "date-time", "type": "string", "description": "Time when the error was generated", "example": "2026-02-23T10:45:12.345" }
Value:
"2026-04-24T04:56:25.324970239"
[404] Not Found:
`{"error":"Not Found","message":"Pizza with id 1 was not found.","timestamp":"2026-04-24T04:56:25.324970239","status":404}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzas/1

Schema at /components/schemas/Pizzeria/properties/address:
{ "type": "string", "description": "Street address", "example": 123 }
Value:
null
[200] OK:
`[{"id":3,"name":"Sicilia Slice","address":null,"phone":null,"createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:53:53"},{"id":4,"name":"ZAP","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:44"},{"id":5,"name":"http://www.google.com/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:45"},{"id":6,"name":"http://www.google.com:80/","address":"688 Zaproxy Ridge","phone":"9999999999","createdAt":"2026-04-24T04:54:45"},{"id":7,"name":"http://www.google.com","address":"688 Z // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://host.docker.internal:8080/api/pizzerias
